mapper.insert: insert into ticket (number, status, user_id, schedule_id, order_time, pay_time, pay_method, pay_status, amount, remark, user_name, phone, cancel_reason, cancel_time, create_time, update_time) values (#{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{scheduleId}, #{orderTime}, #{payTime}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{userName}, #{phone}, #{cancelReason}, #{cancelTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update ticket
status = #{status},
order_time = #{orderTime},
pay_time = #{payTime},
pay_method = #{payMethod},
pay_status = #{payStatus},
amount = #{amount},
remark = #{remark},
user_name = #{userName},
phone = #{phone},
cancel_reason = #{cancelReason},
cancel_time = #{cancelTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select t.*, m.name as movie_name, c.name as cinema_name, h.name as hall_name, s.show_date, s.show_time from ticket t left join schedule s on t.schedule_id = s.id left join movie m on s.movie_id = m.id left join cinema c on s.cinema_id = c.id left join hall h on s.hall_id = h.id where t.id = #{id}

select t.*, m.name as movie_name, c.name as cinema_name, h.name as hall_name, s.show_date, s.show_time from ticket t left join schedule s on t.schedule_id = s.id left join movie m on s.movie_id = m.id left join cinema c on s.cinema_id = c.id left join hall h on s.hall_id = h.id where t.user_id = #{userId} order by t.order_time desc
